system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Light Melee against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 2

You jab your foe in the belly with a stick or similar small blunt weapon, then raise him into the air over your head. On a Success, instead of doing Damage, you can opt to raise your foe above your head. You raise your target above your head and may keep him there for 1 round per Rank of Waijia. While the target is still free to Attack, he cannot move freely as his body is suspended above the ground. He can try to break free using the Restrain rules. Cathartic: This lasts for 1 round per Rank of Waijia, and you can throw your opponent to the ground at any point, knocking him prone and inflicting 1d10 Damage per Rank of Waijia. You may add your Waijia Ranks to your Parry and Evade against the target.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Target is lifted and cannot move freely for 1 round per Rank of Waijia
system.catharticTargetEffects: May throw target prone and deal 1d10 Damage per Rank of Waijia
system.catharticEffect: This lasts for 1 round per Rank of Waijia, and you can throw your opponent to the ground at any point, knocking him prone and inflicting 1d10 Damage per Rank of Waijia. You may add your Waijia Ranks to your Parry and Evade against the target.
